feedback: Item arrived quickly. It was an almost-free gift (cost me €0.09), so I wasn’t expecting much, however, it is utterly useless. The earbud charging doesn’t work: one earbud sometimes flashes blue for a while; the other has flashed blue once or twice for a few seconds but only after repeatedly wiggling it in its charging cradle. Neither earbud actually does anything. All of this isn’t helped by the user manual being only partially written (there’s nothing about the charging box display for instance). I would give this 0 stars if it were possible: it’s junk!

feedback: Este artículo lo recibí como regalo por regar el arbolito pero no por eso no voy a decir la verdad: se escucha mal. Cuando lo conseguí me encontré con un sonido que parecía retumbar una lata. Se lo di a mi hija y me lo devolvió al rato diciendo que lo había probado en su teléfono y se oía mal. Le pongo una valoración neutral porque es verdad que en mi casa usamos audífonos premium con amplificadores entonces seguramente el auriculares no sea malo sino que nosotros estamos acostumbrados a escuchar la música de forma especial. feedbackTranslated: I received this item as a gift for watering the tree, but that doesn't mean I'm not going to tell the truth: it sounds bad. It doesn't have a loud sound like other reviews say (at least the one I received didn't), and it took me a lot of effort to get my iPad back. When I got it, I found a sound that sounded like a can being rattled. I gave it to my daughter and she returned it shortly after, saying that she had tried it on her phone and it sounded bad. I give a neutral rating because it's true that in my house we use premium headphones with amplifiers, so the headphones themselves are probably not bad, but we are used to listening to music in a special way. If I had ordered something else as a gift, I would be delighted. And in any case, thank you Aliexpress for the nice touch.

feedback: при получении обнаружил что панель на станции не светится. наушники не заражаются. оставил наушники на столе, станцию взял в левую руку и несколько раз ударил о правую руку (советский способ ремонта) всё заработало.функционал хороший: два касания старт/стоп, несколько касаний звонок последнему абоненту .музыка/разговор - 70/90 минут (зависит от громкости). громкость хорошая, микрофон без "шумодава" но в помещении приемлемо.совет: если если наушники не синхронизируются переключиться и поменяйте последовательность наушников .от станции можно заряжаться 4(четыре) раза за эти деньги - отличный вариант.
feedbackTranslated: Upon receipt, I discovered that the panel at the station does not light up. The headphones do not get infected. I left the headphones on the table, took the station in my left hand and hit it several times with my right hand (a Soviet-style repair method), and everything worked. The functionality is good: two taps for start/stop, several taps for calling the last contact. music/conversation - 70/90 minutes (depends on volume). The volume is good, the microphone doesn't have a noise canceller but it's acceptable indoors. Tip: if the headphones don't synchronize, switch them around and change the order of the headphones. The station can charge 4 (four) times for this price - an excellent option.

feedback:
l'appairage est compliqué. Sur une fréquence constante de 500hz ou autres, l'écouteur de gauche fait des variations régulières de tonalité. Les aigus sont granuleux, ce qui fait penser à une compression du son type MP3 64k.
Quand je met pause j'entend un bruit de FAX. La voix qui prévient si c'est déconnecté ou OFF est trop forte !
Sur un Huawei je ne peux pas utiliser l'équaliseur car le volume sonore est extrêment haut et même au premier niveau c'est insupportable !
feedbackTranslated:
Pairing is complicated. At a constant frequency of 500hz or other frequencies, the left earphone has regular pitch variations. The treble is grainy sounding, making you feel like a compression of 64k MP3 type sound 
 When I put it on pause, I hear a fax noise. The voice warning when disconnected or OFF is too loud! 
 On a Huawei, I cannot use the equalizer because the sound volume is extremely high and even at the first level it's unbearable!

feedback: This has to be the SINGLE WORST item I've ever received on AliExpress!!! I won these headphones on the Prize Land game, so I only payed 10 cents and yet ... I feel I haven't gotten my money's worth!!!  I'm fairly certain whenever people return these defective 🎧 the seller just ships them off to the next buyer/sucker. They arrived scratched, each headphone bud in the opposite/wrong charging slot and the charge at 60% so probably used. The sound quality sounds like they repurposed a walkie talkie that has been dropped in water. The volume goes from inaudible to too loud in two level boosts. The Bluetooth reception is awful, practically impossible to get a balanced sound without it switching from right to left. And the charger only charges the left. Ironic, since it's literally loud but should not be proud. It's a shame because while the case is cheap, the 🎧 are actually really comfortable and don't slip out. What a waste. Don't pick as a prize and don't give these CROOKS your cash👎👎

feedback: I was not expecting much from these ear buds because they were a prize in Prize Land. However, I have been quite pleasantly surprised by how good the sound quality is, along with how comfortably they sit in my ears. The charging case is unfortunately very lightweight and the charging contacts are too small; the slightest disturbance of the case tends to disconnect the buds from the charging contacts. That being said, the Bluetooth pairing was quick and reliable. The documentation (user manual) was lacking, but I was still able to use the buds "out of the box" anyway.
feedbackTranslated:
I was not expecting much from these ear buds because they were a prize in prize land. However, i have been quite pleasantly surprised by how good the sound quality is, along with how comfortably they sit in my ears. 
 The charging case is unfortunately very lightweight and the charging contacts are too small; the slightest disturbance of the case tends to disconnect the buds from the charging contacts. 
 That being said, the bluetooth pairing was quick and reliable. The documentation (user manual) was lacking, but i was still able to use the buds "out of the box" anyway.

For the price, the earbuds are good. The sound is really good. The distance from a source is more like 3 to 4 meters rather than 10, in a brick walled house.

 The charging box does charge the buds. 
 
 Not sound cancelling, but music still sounds nice. So if you're worried about loosing your expensive earbuds grab a pair of these. 
 
 It's a pair i can take out and about.

feedbackTranslated: Received the headphones. It's been a little over two weeks. We connected via Bluetooth ourselves and quickly. No need to click anything a hundred times. Turned on Bluetooth on the phone, found the headphones, selected to connect and everything is ready. They play quite loudly, but the sound quality is not very good, well for the price it's probably okay. And I won them in a tree watering contest for 10 cents, what more could I ask for. The kit includes only a short Type-C charging cable, but another good thing is that in addition to Type-C charging, there is also a regular USB output, and you can use the headphone case to urgently charge your phone a little. I don't know how they will perform and how long the batteries will last. But I recommend the seller and thank you for the product!

feedbackTranslated: EXCELLENT

feedback:
Entregado por Amazon Shipping, el repartidor LO DEJÓ ABANDONADO EN EL ASCENSOR.

El producto no se corresponde con la descripción.

Descargados, empiezan a cargar desde la tercera raya (dos fijas). Nunca he visto las 5 rayas fijas, Cuando están cargados se apagan y si se saca uno y se vuelve a poner empieza a cargar con 2, 3 o 4 rayas parpadeando, aunque cesa de cargar en unos segundos. 

Cada carga dura 1h 20min  el izquierdo y de 1 h 40 min el derecho.

La carga de la caja del 2% al 81% tardó una hora, cargando entre 195 y 230 mA

He visto videos en youtube que explican la diferencia entre los originales, con cierre magnético en la tapa, y los copiados, con cierre a presión. Pero ambos con leds bicolor azul/rojo. Estos tienen cierre a presión y leds sólo azules, no rojos, deben ser una copia de la copia.

Le doy dos estrellas porque al menos funcionan.
feedbackTranslated:
Delivered by Amazon Shipping, the delivery person LEFT IT ABANDONED IN THE ELEVATOR.  
  
 The product does not correspond to the description.  
  
 Discharged, they start charging from the third stripe (two fixed). I have never seen the fixed 5 bars. When they are charged, they turn off, and if one is removed and put back in, it starts charging with 2, 3, or 4 bars flashing, although it stops charging in a few seconds.  
  
 Each charge lasts 1 hour and 20 minutes for the left one and 1 hour and 40 minutes for the right one.  
  
 Charging the box from 2% to 81% took one hour, charging between 195 and 230 mA.  
  
 I have seen videos on YouTube that explain the difference between the originals, with a magnetic closure on the lid, and the copied ones, with a snap closure. But both with bicolor blue/red LEDs. These have a snap closure and only blue LEDs, not red ones, they must be a copy of the copy.  
  
 I give it two stars because at least they work.

feedback: Y no le doy menos por que no se puede.   Si bien me lo gane regando el arbolito, no es escusa para la cochinada que llego.  Creo que era usado. El lado izquierdo es el único que sirve, el Derecho no prende y NUNCA deja estarse cargando. A.. y la caja toda golpeada., de pura suerte no se salió el producto por que venia dentro de la bolsa de entrega
feedbackTranslated:
And I don't give less because it's not possible.  
 Although I earned it by watering the little tree, it is no excuse for the mess that arrived. I think it was used. In all the Unboxing videos I see, the headphones come outside the box in their space in the 'protector' but they arrived to me with them inside... without additional earbuds...  
 The left side is the only one that works, the right one doesn't turn on and NEVER lets it finish charging.  
 And although the left side turns on, no touch function works... no matter how much I press with my finger... or do the little touches that the instructions say. Doesn't respond to anything, not even to turn them off...  
  
 And the box was all damaged. By pure luck, the product didn't come out because it was inside the delivery bag.

الكفر الأخضر اللي اخترته يتميّز بلونه الحيوي والأنيق، يعطي لمسة عصرية وملفتة للنظر. اللون الأخضر عادة يرمز إلى الهدوء والطبيعة، وهذا يخلي الموبايل يطلع بشكل مميز بعيد عن الألوان التقليدية.

⸻

feedback:
I ordered this silicone case from AliExpress and honestly I’m very satisfied with it. The quality surprised me for the price. The material feels very soft and premium when holding the phone, almost like the official silicone cases.

What I like the most is that it doesn’t feel bulky at all. It fits the phone nicely, keeps the slim profile, and still gives good protection. The finish also feels smooth and comfortable in the hand.

For such a low price, the quality is really impressive. If you’re looking for a simple, clean, and comfortable case, I would definitely recommend this one.

I ordered this silicone case from aliexpress and honestly i’m very satisfied with it. The quality surprised me for the price. The material feels very soft and premium when holding the phone, almost like the official silicone cases.

feedback:
The on switch is broken. Push that knob to on mode and the lamp was lit for only a split second.
After I opend it I noticed a small metal bar that supposed to be pushed by the switch to close the circuite,
but the switch fails to keep that metal bar in place. This thing won't lit unless you keep pressing the metal bar.
Even when the light is on it is too weak for night reading.

Dont buy this!
feedbackTranslated:
The on switch is broken. Push that knob to on mode and the lamp was lit for only a split second.  
 After i opend it i noticed a small metal bar that supposed to be pushed by the switch to close the circuite,  
 But the switch fails to keep that metal bar in place. This thing won't lit unless you keep pressing the metal bar.  
 Even when the light is on it is too weak for night reading.  
  
 Dont buy this!

feedback:
Confesso que a avaliação desse produto tem minha culpa também, por motivos de que, comprei esse produto em um bundle e não li a descrição dele. Dito isso, não alterna em nada minha avaliação.

Primeiramente a começar pela fonte de energia dele, que é a pilha. Conforme descrito tem duração de 10 horas, ou seja, 1 noite e já era, e foi isso que aconteceu comigo. Não compensa.

Segundo, para trocar de pilha, você abre a tampa de baixo, até ai tudo bem, só que o botão de ligar/desligar é solto. Aí tu imagina ficar trocando de pilha toda hora e o botão ficar caindo, que maravilha.
feedbackTranslated:
I confess that the evaluation of this product is partly my fault because I bought it as a bundle and didn't read its description. Having said that, my evaluation does not change in any way.  
  
 Firstly, starting with its power source, which is the battery. As described, it lasts for 10 hours, meaning 1 night and that's it, and that's what happened to me. It's not worth it.  
  
 Secondly, to change the battery, you open the bottom cover, which is fine, but the power button is loose. So you can imagine having to change batteries all the time and the button keeps falling off, what a delight.

feedback:
Adquirí este producto después de ver varias recomendaciones y, sinceramente, la experiencia ha sido bastante positiva para el precio que maneja. Llegó bien empaquetado, sin daños y dentro del tiempo estimado, algo que siempre se agradece cuando se compra en línea. A primera vista, los materiales se sienten acordes al costo: no son de gama alta, pero tampoco dan la impresión de romperse con facilidad. Su diseño es simple, funcional y suficientemente práctico para el uso cotidiano.
En cuanto al desempeño, cumple exactamente con lo que promete. No ofrece características extraordinarias ni un rendimiento excepcional, pero es consistente, fácil de utilizar y no requiere mucha configuración. Para tareas básicas y de uso diario resulta adecuado, especialmente si no se busca algo profesional o de larga duración intensiva. Además, incluye algunos accesorios útiles que complementan la experiencia y amplían ligeramente sus posibilidades.
feedbackTranslated:
I acquired this product after seeing several recommendations and, honestly, the experience has been quite positive for the price it offers. It arrived well packaged, without damage and within the estimated time, something that is always appreciated when buying online. At first glance, the materials feel in line with the cost: they are not high-end, but they also don't give the impression of breaking easily. Its design is simple, functional and practical enough for everyday use. 
 As for performance, it delivers exactly what it promises. It doesn't offer extraordinary features or exceptional performance, but it is consistent, easy to use, and doesn't require much configuration. For basic tasks and daily use it is suitable, especially if you are not looking for something professional or long-lasting intensive use. Additionally, it includes some useful accessories that complement the experience and slightly expand its possibilities.

feedback: Vorsicht bei der Bestellung, obwohl man Anspruch auf kostenlose Rücksendung hat soll man mit den Rücksendekosten in Vorkasse gehen, nur wer dies macht sieht sein Geld nicht wieder. Wendet man sich an den Kundendienst kommt erst einmal nichts, nach etlichen Kontakten kam dann mal etwas aber nur Ausflüchte, also aufgepasst bei der Bestellung. Für mich gilt nie wieder denn dies ist nicht Kundenfreundlich sondern Kundenabzocke!!!
feedbackTranslated: Be careful when ordering, although you are entitled to free returns, you should pay for the return shipping costs upfront. Only those who do this will not get their money back. These are all just empty promises. I just experienced it with someone else. When contacting customer service, initially there is no response. After several attempts, something comes up but only excuses. So be careful when ordering. For me, it's never again because this is not customer-friendly but rather customer exploitation!! !

feedback:
La spedizione è arrivata nei tempi prestabiliti, il vestito, per quanto a prezzo contenutissimo, non ne vale la pena. Non è come in foto e non cinge correttamente la vita, dando l'idea di un corpo tozzo, senza esaltare correttamente le forme sinuose dei fianchi e della schiena. La soluzione chr ho trovato per "salvare" il prodotto è stata quella di associarci una cintura elasticizzata simil-corsetto che vada a valorizzare meglio il punto vita. Per il resto per un'altezza di 160cm la lunghezza è congrua, sicuramente molto superiore all'immagine (che invece rappresenta un prodotto che valorizza le curve, ma è decisamente troppo inguinale per i miei gusti).
In definitiva, se lo volete acquistare, sappiate che dovrete fare degli adattamenti almeno con gli accessori.

feedback:
La caja ha llegado en tal mal estado que pensé que estaría rota la picadora  Felizmente ha aguantado. 
Escogí el modelo más pequeño y realmente funciona. 
El material tanto de la tapa como del depósito donde se colocan las laminas es de plástico bastante resistente. En la parte de abajo tiene una goma que ayuda a que al picar la picadora no deslice, muy útil la verdad. 
A la hora de picar lo hace muy bien pero aconsejo a colocar ya troceado lo que se quiera picar de forma a ayudar a que el resultado sea excelente. Igualmente aconsejo que no se llene mucho de forma que las láminas no queden presas. Si acaso se nota que la cuerda no anda, es señal que están las láminas presas, normalmente un pequeño meneo bastará para que se acomode todo pero si no es así, mejor sacar algo del contenido. 
A la hora de lavar aconsejo a mano. La tapa deja entrar agua dentro así que aconsejo que se deje escurrir muy bien evitando que quede dentro.
feedbackTranslated:
The box arrived in such bad condition that I thought the chopper would be broken. Fortunately, it held up. 
 I chose the smaller model and it really works. 
 The material of both the lid and the container where the sheets are placed is quite durable plastic. At the bottom it has a rubber that helps prevent the chopper from sliding when you're chopping, which is really useful. 
 When it comes to chopping, it does a very good job, but I recommend placing the item you want to chop already chopped to help ensure an excellent result. I also advise not to fill it too much so that the sheets don't get trapped. If you notice that the rope isn't moving, it's a sign that the blades are stuck; usually a small movement will be enough to get everything back into place, but if that's not the case, it's better to remove some of the contents. 
 When washing, I recommend doing it by hand. The lid allows water to enter inside, so I advise letting it drain well to prevent it from staying inside.

feedback: I had very low expectations when I ordered this... but I was wrong! This thing really works! I have the smaller 500ml version, and I have mainly chopped onions and garlic with it. After 10-20 pulls of the handle (and a little bit of shaking to dislodge pieces stuck to the sides), you end up with fairly uniform 2mm-ish pieces. To my surprise, it even coped with ginger and carrots, as long as you chop them up a little bit first. I use this pretty regularly now. Great item.
